The '''Medal of Dignity''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] pilot medal awarded for successfully [[Strategic Warfare|holding off]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin's]] attacks against the Empire's [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]] production facilities.

The plants were eventually destroyed, however the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] managed to stand their ground for quite some time, and managed to destroy a portion of Zaarin's forces, therefore maintaining their dignity.

==Design==
The ribbon possessed blue linings, and was primarily red with some downward diagonal golden stripes, with the top featuring a bird in flight. The medal itself was silver and featured a massive red gem at the center. Close inspection of the gem portion shows that the gem itself is adorned with the [[Imperial crest/Legends|Imperial Crest]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
